title: Arcadia Create S2
description: Arcadia Create S2 is a magic and Create modpack that blends mystical powers with mechanical engineering, letting players use spells alongside complex machines for a creative and dynamic gameplay experience.
body:
# What is this modpack about?
This modpack is based on the amazing factory mod,✨ [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) ✨! The modpack is based of [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) as you know, but we also wanted to bring a touch of roleplay into it so we added mods like [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-voice-chat) and [Incapacitated](https://modrinth.com/mod/incapacitated) which brings talking in game and a reviving system to Minecraft.

# Season 2
This modpack is the second edition of Arcadia Create, but it represents much more than just a follow-up. We've rebuilt this modpack entirely from the ground up, with a fresh vision and new ideas. Our goal was to create something truly our own, rather than simply relying on a pre-existing modpack made by someone else.

# Exploring the world
We added some mods that make exploration more fun! Much cooler world generation and structures that you can walk through, it gets me excited just thinking about it!

Thanks to mods like [Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty) and [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith) makes this generation so cool! And then, many of the **Yung's** mods that changes the structures so it looks so... WOW!  It changes the vanilla structures in a way that I LOVE!

# Food
What would a modpack be without some better food than the normal, boring minecraft food? Answer: A modpack without [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) or just a boring modpack where you would starve to death because you don't wanna eat something boring again and again and again... But we don't want the players to starve to death, we want them to have fun cooking a good meal, maybe some pasta with meatballs or a fish stew! But we didn't stop there, we added [Some Assembly Required](https://modrinth.com/mod/some-assembly-required), the mod where you can make sandwiches and have like anything edible, a tomato with golden apple sandwich, make it! Then we also added [Create Central Kitchen](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-central-kitchen), the mod when you don't wanna cook so you make a automatic factory just because your lazy. Are you really that lazy that you don't cook your own food, but you make a whole factory so that the food is made? Just saying, makeing your own food is a lot more lazy than making a automatic factory
 
# Create-mod
What was this modpack about again? You're right, [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)! But why did I just talk about exploration and food? I don't know! And what would a create modpack be without create? You're right, a non-create modpack!

I can tell you little short about [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) because everyone that has been on the modded side of minecraft would know about the great [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create). [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) is a mod that adds a lot of machinery. It's full of cogwheels, drills, saws, trains and much more! 

# Credits

Special thanks to [Sillen](https://modrinth.com/user/Sillen) for making such a detailed description. We are also incredibly grateful to [GabGabbe](https://modrinth.com/user/Gabgabbe) for their hard work in developing the modpack, which brings all of these ideas to life in such a seamless and engaging way.
